source_artifact_id.description: Preferred PopiArt artifact ID for the Alice source frame.

image_url.description: Stable Alice source URL for the current environment.

motion_prompt.description: Short motion direction for the Alice clip.

aspect_ratio.description: Portable framing hint such as 16:9 or 9:16.

retry_on_character_drift.description: Whether one retry is allowed when Alice drifts too far from the source.

notes.description: Optional extra constraints confirmed with the user.
